The 'ensureWorkbenchSession' function makes the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 1225) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the definition of 'ensureWorkbenchSession' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suggestions.desc: Wrap the definition of 'ensureWorkbenchSession' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'generateAIResponse', 'queuedMessages', and 'setMessages'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [streaming, sessionId, queuedMessages, setMessages, generateAIResponse]
